questions.question: Describe the main components of e-waste and their contribution to pollution. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on the environmental impact of e-waste composition

questions.question: Explain the factors that influence the generation of e-waste in a developing country. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Consider the role of consumer behavior, technological advancements, and economic factors

questions.question: What are the environmental implications of the improper disposal of hazardous electronic waste? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on the potential effects on human health and the ecosystem
